name: mat3M_silent_cassette
description: Silent storage cassette mat3-M on S. pombe chromosome II. ~2.4 kb donor cassette carrying M (minus) information, located ~30 kb centromere-proximal to mat1. Silenced by Clr4-H3K9me-Swi6.
expected_copy_count: 3 cassettes total (mat1 active + mat2-P + mat3-M silent), all on chrII
